positionList.title: Business Development Manager for University Admissions Advising Division
positionList.description:

• Identified new revenue stream after discovering unmet demand for interview prep services within lead and client exit surveys, improving net profit per advisor by 10% 
• Developed and executed go-to-market strategy to capture entirely new customer segment; increased MRR by 15% and CLV by 10%
• Persuaded board to replace master brand marketing strategy with a differentiated approach, raising lead conversion across all three brands by 15% on average

positionList.title: Co-Founder and CEO
positionList.description:
Careerspan bridges the gap between human potential and meaningful opportunity. We're transforming how professionals articulate their value and how organizations discover exceptional talent—because resumes alone can't capture what makes someone truly remarkable.

We help professionals:
• Uncover and articulate your unique strengths through guided AI coaching
• Build lasting confidence by understanding your authentic professional value
• Connect with opportunities aligned to your mindset, not just your keywords
• Create a living career narrative that evolves with your growth

We deliver to employers:
• Deep talent insights that reveal how candidates think, work, and contribute
• Dramatic reduction in screening calls and interview rounds
• Higher hiring confidence through comprehensive candidate understanding
• Access to overlooked talent whose potential transcends traditional credentials

Our approach: We use conversational AI to build rich, multidimensional profiles that capture the intangible qualities behind 89% of hiring success—values alignment, problem-solving approach, and collaborative style. This isn't another assessment tool; it's a new way to see and be seen professionally.

Our mission: Democratize career advancement by ensuring every person's true capabilities are recognized and valued, creating a world where opportunity finds talent, not just the other way around.

positionList.title: Sales Strategy, Programs, and Enablement MBA Intern
positionList.description:
• Owned tech tool enablement for 60+ person sales organization, including seller onboarding, upskilling, and workflow optimization for core sales motions
• Defined departmental priorities based on seller painpoints and sub-optimal workflows identified through analysis of Salesforce and Outreach usage date and user interviews 
• Created tech tool training materials for new sellers, increasing Q3 cohort’s prospecting email volume by 2x and call volume by 3x and decreasing overdue tasks by 30% compared to Q2 peers 
• Optimized tech tool provisioning through workflow automation after securing buy-in from three departments and sales leadership; reduced email requests by 70%
